title: Tameson Review: The Smart Industrial Supplier for Valves, Fittings, Pneumatics & Fluid Control
excerpt: When engineers, maintenance teams, and workshop owners need reliable fluid control and pneumatic components, they don’t…
body:
When engineers, maintenance teams, and workshop owners need reliable fluid control and pneumatic components, they don’t want generic marketplaces. They want a specialized industrial supplier with deep technical filtering, datasheets, and ready stock.

That’s exactly where Tameson stands out.

Tameson is a Netherlands-based industrial e-commerce company focused on valves, fittings, pneumatics, hoses, pressure control, and measurement components for real engineering use.

Their mission is simple:

Make industrial sourcing simple, technical, and fast.

What Tameson Specializes In

Tameson is not a general hardware shop. Their catalog is tightly focused on:

  • Ball valves & needle valves
  • Solenoid valves (air, water, gas)
  • Pneumatic components (FRL, cylinders, fittings)
  • Hose barb & threaded fittings (brass, stainless steel, plastic)
  • Pressure gauges & regulators
  • Tubing, hoses, and accessories

Every category includes engineering filters like pressure rating, thread type (BSP/NPT), material, seal type, temperature range, and media compatibility.

👉 Browse the full range here: https://tidd.ly/3ZfY2Qe

Industrial Ball Valves (High Pressure Shut-Off)

Ball valves are among the most demanded items for workshops and plants. Tameson offers:

  • Brass, stainless steel, and steel variants
  • Full-bore and mini designs
  • BSP & NPT threading options
  • Vented versions for safe depressurization
  • Ratings up to hundreds of bar for hydraulic lines

These are ideal for water lines, compressed air, oils, fuels, and hydraulic systems.

🛒 Shop ball valves: https://tidd.ly/3ZfY2Qe

Solenoid Valves for Automation & Fluid Control

This is where Tameson originally built its reputation.

You’ll find:

  • 2-way and 3-way solenoid valves
  • Normally closed / normally open options
  • 12V, 24V, 230V coils
  • FKM, EPDM, NBR seal choices for chemical compatibility
  • Stainless steel bodies for aggressive media

Perfect for automation panels, RO plants, compressors, dosing systems, and gas control.

🛒 Explore solenoid valves: https://tidd.ly/3ZfY2Qe

Pneumatic FRL Units, Fittings & Air Preparation

For compressed air systems, Tameson provides complete air-prep solutions:

  • Filter-Regulator-Lubricator (FRL) units
  • Push-in pneumatic fittings
  • Air silencers and mufflers
  • PU/PA air tubing

These are essential for CNC shops, packaging units, garages, and automation lines.

🛒 Shop pneumatic components: https://tidd.ly/3ZfY2Qe

Hose Barbs, Threaded Fittings & Adaptors

A major pain point in workshops is finding the correct thread and hose combination. Tameson solves this with:

  • Straight, elbow, tee, and reducer fittings
  • Brass and stainless steel options
  • Clear thread standards (BSP, NPT, metric)
  • Multiple hose diameters

🛒 Find the exact fitting you need: https://tidd.ly/3ZfY2Qe

Why Engineers Prefer Tameson

Technical filters that make sense – choose by pressure, material, media, seal, and thread.
Datasheets on product pages – no guessing compatibility.
Niche focus – only fluid control and pneumatics, done properly.
Global shipping – fast dispatch for urgent maintenance needs.

This is why many maintenance teams bookmark Tameson as their go-to valve and fittings supplier.

Final Verdict

If your work involves fluid lines, air lines, pressure systems, automation, or hydraulic control, Tameson is one of the most practical online suppliers available today.

Instead of searching multiple marketplaces, you can source correct, compatible industrial parts in one place.

👉 Start browsing and order here: https://tidd.ly/3ZfY2Qe
